calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margared M. O'Dowd for and with (Administrator) Leroy Gatlin. Will Gatlin also present.

Mr. Will Gatlin stated that he had no objections. Ms. O'Dowd stated that there have been no objections. The Court granted the petition for final distribution and signed the order in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Continued To Jun-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Additional Bond
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Additional Bond
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret O'Dowd for and with Leroy Gatlin.

The Court noted that Willie Gatlin was not present. Ms. O'Dowd stated that Willie's main concern is that he lives in the house and that she explained to him at the last hearing that the house would need to be sold. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $406,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret O'Dowd for Leroy Gatlin. Willie Gatlin in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Willie Gatlin stated that he objects to the appointment of Leroy Gatlin and that he feels all of the Siblings should handle the estate. The Court informed Willie Gatlin that he needs to file his objections and suggested that he obtain a Lawyer. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to October 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
